scripts.dev:api: uv run --env-file apps/api/.env.supabase --directory apps/api uvicorn app.main:app --reload --host 127.0.0.1 --port 3335
scripts.dev:api:supabase: uv run --env-file apps/api/.env.supabase --directory apps/api uvicorn app.main:app --reload --host 127.0.0.1 --port 3335
scripts.api:sync:supabase: uv run --env-file apps/api/.env.supabase --directory apps/api python -m app.scripts.sync_source
